title: Mounts stay still
description: The “don't move mister horse” feature you're looking for.
body:
# Mounts stay still!
Stop the horse from moving away from where you left him. Because it's too likely they'll be thousands of blocks away after 5 minutes.

## ⚙️ Server side!
If you only install this datapack/mod on your server/LAN, it will work for everyone else without them needing to install it!

## 📖 Instructions:
Works with **any entity\*** that can be ridden with a saddle! Because only they are good boys :)
- If you remove the saddle while you're on the horse, it will no longer work.
- But if you remove the saddle **after** leaving the horse, it will stay still!


```
* BELOW 1.21.5: Only for horse, zombie/skeleton horse, camel, donkey, mule.
* 1.21.5 AND HIGHER: Any entity ridable with a basic saddle.
```

## ⤵️ Installation:
### Datapack:
Download the latest release and put the datapack  `.zip` file into the datapacks folder of your Minecraft world.
### Mod:
Download the latest release and put the mod  `.jar` file into the mods folder of your Minecraft game.

## ✍️ Feedback, Questions & Suggestions
I'm always listening! If you happen to have questions, suggestions or just encountered a bug, then feel free to join my discord server to ask for help in the "mods and datapacks" section. [Click to join the server](https://discord.gg/kwzQWS4)
